calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-10-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/E. Estacio, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Petitioner: Risto Robert Hannonin-Gladden, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
Court ordered matter dismissed without prejudice.
